name: San Juan (Puerto Rico, United States)
description: A blue field bearing the coat of arms of San Juan in the centre — a lamb on a book and a quiver of arrows, granted to the city in 1511.
history: San Juan is the capital and most populous city of Puerto Rico. Its coat of arms, granted by Charles V in 1511, is one of the oldest in the New World.

features.role: Coat of arms of San Juan (Lamb of God on the Book of Seven Seals)
